noseOnly.referenceSource: joints.nose.y; wrist from derived wristAboveNose*; distal best-visible vs nose

earOnly.referenceSource: left wrist vs leftEar, right vs rightEar; meta.referenceY mean(leftEar,rightEar) when both

currentHeadTopProxy.referenceSource: overheadHeadTopProxyY (min nose, leftEar, rightEar); matches production 04E headTopProxy

relaxedHeadTopProxyCandidate.referenceSource: diagnostic-only: max(nose,leftEar,rightEar) y — lower barrier than min() proxy; not a gate

faceCenterCandidate.referenceSource: diagnostic-only: mean y of available nose/ears; bounded alternative to min headTopProxy
